description: K. A. D. Darshana Anid Vs. Lanka Sugar Company (Pvt) Limited and Another before Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: K. A. D. Darshana Anid Vs. Lanka Sugar Company (Pvt) Limited and Another
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
keywords: Does the Court of Appeal have a revisionary jurisdiction in terms of Article 138 of the Constitution in respect of a decision of the Provincial High Court made in the exercise of the appellate jurisdiction in terms of section 31DD(1) of the Industrial Dispute Act No. 43 of 1950 as amended to be read with sections 9(a) and 10 of the High Court of the Provinces (Special Provisions) Act, No. 19 of 1990
legistation: Article 138, Article 154P(3)(b) of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Section 3 and Section 9(a), Section 10 of the High Court of the Provinces (Special Provisions) Act, No. 19 of 1990, Sections, 31DD and 31D(3) of the Industrial Disputes Act, as amended.
